title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers presents five production deployment best practices for AI agents: streaming tool events for UI responsiveness, layered authentication with OAuth and IAM, contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails with cost budgets and model routing, and observability with metrics and distributed tracing. Patterns are demonstrated using TypeScript with Strands Agents SDK and AWS services but claimed to apply generally.
